title: Astrality
description: An add-on for Terramity that adds new materials, equipment and artifacts.
body:
### About

Astrality is an addon for Terramity that expands the game with new progression options and creative mechanics. It introduces alternative materials to those found in Terramity, providing players with more variety in crafting and playstyles. Alongside these resources, the addon adds new weapons with unique properties and artifacts featuring interesting abilities that can change how you approach combat and exploration.
The mod also contains many references to pop culture and local jokes.

![Armors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b71b3233724f5de7e40afb27db43451724e9fd1.png)
## Future
![accessories](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f795f4f274f12de596c95424a42a41a02c1ac2be_0.webp)

The project is designed to grow over time with themed updates and patches, each adding more depth and content to enrich the overall experience. Whether you’re looking for fresh tools, inventive artifacts, or simply new paths to progress, Astrality aims to complement Terramity while giving you new reasons to experiment and explore.
